query:
UPDATE host_listings 
SET 
  overseasExperience = 'I have traveled widely across different regions and cultures, which has deepened my appreciation for authentic home cooking and genuine hospitality.',
  funFacts = 'I''m known as a true daughter of Jiading Old Town - the birthplace of Shanghai''s famous Xiao Long Bao! Since 2016, I''ve been a Superhost on Airbnb, welcoming hundreds of guests from around the world into my courtyard home.',
  whyHost = 'Though my English is limited, I believe hospitality is universal. I communicate through the language of delicious food, and I love sharing the warmth of authentic Shanghai home cooking with visitors. Every meal is a chance to connect across cultures.',
  culturalPassions = 'I''m passionate about preserving traditional Jiading culinary heritage, especially our famous soup dumplings. I love sharing stories about old Shanghai neighborhoods and introducing guests to the authentic flavors that have been passed down through generations in my family.'
WHERE hostName = 'Ayi';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute UPDATE host_listings 
SET 
  overseasExperience = 'I have traveled widely across different regions and cultures, which has deepened my appreciation for authentic home cooking and genuine hospitality.',
  funFacts = 'I''m known as a true daughter of Jiading Old Town - the birthplace of Shanghai''s famous Xiao Long Bao! Since 2016, I''ve been a Superhost on Airbnb, welcoming hundreds of guests from around the world into my courtyard home.',
  whyHost = 'Though my English is limited, I believe hospitality is universal. I communicate through the language of delicious food, and I love sharing the warmth of authentic Shanghai home cooking with visitors. Every meal is a chance to connect across cultures.',
  culturalPassions = 'I''m passionate about preserving traditional Jiading culinary heritage, especially our famous soup dumplings. I love sharing stories about old Shanghai neighborhoods and introducing guests to the authentic flavors that have been passed down through generations in my family.'
WHERE hostName = 'Ayi';
